title: LITTLE LEAGUE - 211info
text: LITTLE LEAGUE LITTLE LEAGUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides baseball and softball programs. Some leagues offer a Challenger Division for youth with physical and developmental disabilities. Eligibility: Ages 4-16 Hours: Not applicable Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for local league contact information FEES: Varies by service. No one turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Disability Related Sports Team Sports/Leagues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
